packet_markdown:
# Sunset Vine Tower building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: sunset-vine-tower-1480-vine-st
- Address: 1480 Vine St
- Primary URL: https://sunsetvinetower.com/
- Management company: SRG Residential
- Recommended status: rejected
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 1 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Management: 2 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 2 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 3
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: medium
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site still explicitly markets a Sunset Boulevard high-rise lifestyle at the Sunset/Vine crossroads. Source: Sunset Vine Tower official site (https://sunsetvinetower.com/). Note: Official copy describes a sky-high sanctuary right on Sunset Boulevard.
- [news] SRG Residential announced it had been awarded management of Sunset Vine Tower, confirming a recent management-side milestone. Source: Sares Regis Group news (https://www.sares-regis.com/post/srg-residential-awarded-management-of-high-rise-on-historic-sunset-vine). Note: SRG said it inked the management contract for Sunset Vine Tower.
- [review] Birdeye shows a meaningful body of public resident feedback, indicating that review depth exists even if the repo keeps a reject decision. Source: Birdeye (https://reviews.birdeye.com/sunset-vine-tower-apartments-156632004298060). Note: Birdeye showed 46 customer reviews in the public profile.

## Open questions
- None beyond normal unit-level verification.

## Notes
Rejected because the current official positioning still leans into the exact Sunset/Vine exposure that the repo had already flagged as too risky for a quiet-first move. Public review depth exists, but it does not override the legacy quiet and maintenance concerns.
